mapper.sql: ROLE_ID, ROLE_NAME, IS_AVAILABLE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3, WEIGHT, ORG
mapper.select:
select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
from tbl_role
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into tbl_role
ROLE_ID,
ROLE_NAME,
IS_AVAILABLE,
CREATE_TIME,
CREATE_BY,
UPDATE_TIME,
UPDATE_BY,
RESERVED_FIELD1,
RESERVED_FIELD2,
RESERVED_FIELD3,
WEIGHT,
ORG,
#{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update tbl_role
ROLE_ID = #{record.roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROLE_NAME = #{record.roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_AVAILABLE = #{record.isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CREATE_BY = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WEIGHT = #{record.weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{record.org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update tbl_role set ROLE_ID = #{record.roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROLE_NAME = #{record.roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_AVAILABLE = #{record.isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CREATE_BY = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WEIGHT = #{record.weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG = #{record.org,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update tbl_role
ROLE_NAME = #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WEIGHT = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update tbl_role set ROLE_NAME = #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WEIGHT = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.sql: ROLE_ID, ROLE_NAME, IS_AVAILABLE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3, WEIGHT, ORG
mapper.insert:
insert into TBL_ROLE
ROLE_ID,
ROLE_NAME,
IS_AVAILABLE,
CREATE_TIME,
CREATE_BY,
UPDATE_TIME,
UPDATE_BY,
RESERVED_FIELD1,
RESERVED_FIELD2,
RESERVED_FIELD3,
WEIGHT,
ORG,
#{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update TBL_ROLE
ROLE_NAME = #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WEIGHT = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update TBL_ROLE set ROLE_NAME = #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WEIGHT = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
